headline: Visa vs Mastercard: The Better Buy This Year
summary: If you have $2,500 to put into payments networks today, the choice between Visa (NYSE:V) and Mastercard (NYSE:MA) is sharper than usual. Both just posted Q1 FY2026 results that beat estimates, both leaned on resilient cross-border spending, and both rolled out new platforms aimed at agentic commerce and stablecoins. headline: TheFork Joins AmEx's Growing Global Dining Network in $700M Deal
summary: American Express will acquire TheFork from Tripadvisor for about $700M, expanding its dining network to roughly 75,000 bookable venues across Europe.

headline: Alliant Credit Union Launches Jumbo High-Rate Checking Account with Up to 2.00% APY and No Earnings Cap
summary: Alliant Credit Union has launched its Jumbo High-Rate Checking Account, a high-yield checking account that offers the opportunity to earn up to 2.00% APY (Annual Percentage Yield), no monthly fees, and no cap on interest earned.

headline: Asia Pacific Travellers Seek Familiarity, Practicality, Flexibility Amid Shifting Global Dynamics: Visa Report
summary: Visa, a global leader in payments, unveils key findings from the 2026 Global Travel Intentions (GTI) study, the latest edition of its flagship global study that has captured global travel patterns and preferences for over 20 years.
